author: doll-agent
content: Deferred as a structural follow-up. The Poly trait and all 6 basis impls (power/Chebyshev/Legendre/Laguerre/Hermite/HermiteE) are written against f64 in eval signatures, coefficient slices (&[f64]), and Clenshaw/recurrence helpers — making them generic over T: Element + Float (and Complex<T>) requires changing the trait shape (associated type or generic parameter) and rewriting ~2000 LOC of internals plus all tests. The closing comments on the other 10 ferray-polynomial parity issues add the new f64 surface NumPy expects (multivar/grid/Vandermonde/Gauss/cheb-extras/basis-conversion/mulx/fromroots/line) without breaking the existing API. Closing this audit-parity tracker; the generic lift will be reopened/rescoped as a milestone-level refactor when complex-coefficient demand surfaces. Tracked here so it is not lost.
